latest_run.no_run_reason: scheduled database model run missed the same-day deadline

features.thesis: 價格貼近MA20，外資連買12日；營收年增55.6%且增速擴大，低波動整理有利5日續強與20日修復。
features.risk: 連續買盤可能轉為擁擠；若外資轉賣且價格明顯跌回MA20下方，修復假設失效。

features.thesis: 價格僅高於MA20約0.8%，外資連買3日，品質與獲利率改善兼具，具備5日突破及20日延續的均衡條件。
features.risk: 波動率偏高且營收增速放緩；若外資流向反轉並失守MA20，短期突破條件失效。

features.thesis: 價格接近MA20與MA60，外資連買7日且五日買超強，低波動與未過度延伸提供較佳5日及20日報酬風險比。
features.risk: 營收動能略降且毛利率走弱；若外資連買中止並跌破MA20，籌碼支撐假設失效。

features.thesis: 價格低於MA20約9.3%但仍貼近MA60，外資連買9日，品質及獲利率改善支持5日反彈與20日均值修復。
features.risk: 營收增速明顯放緩，價格仍處修正段；若失守MA60且外資買盤消退，反彈假設失效。

features.thesis: 價格略低於MA20與MA60，外資三日及五日買超強，品質、獲利率改善及低波動形成防守型5日與20日修復配置。
features.risk: 防守屬性可能限制上行幅度，融券比亦偏高；若外資買盤轉弱且持續低於MA20，修復條件失效。

latest_run.no_run_reason: scheduled web model run missed the same-day deadline

features.thesis: 5 sessions: a 3.51% fall versus the index's 6.47% loss and deep liquidity support a relative-strength rebound if forced selling eases. 20 sessions: record June revenue (+52.11% YoY) and the dated 5 August revenue release provide a forward catalyst; the rank is capped for AI-hardware crowding.
features.risk: A continued AI-server de-rating or another global risk-off leg can overwhelm fundamentals; rapid revenue growth may carry lower margins, while geopolitical and FX shocks could delay conversion into earnings.

features.thesis: 5 sessions: the broad-market dislocation creates rebound asymmetry, while heavy investment-trust selling is explicitly treated as an unwind penalty rather than bullish flow. 20 sessions: June revenue growth of 61.62% and first-half growth of 36.83% can support estimate revisions if server mix converts to profit.
features.risk: ODM margins are thin, AI-server mix may raise revenue faster than profit, and the three-session institutional selloff may continue; another technology liquidation would invalidate the rebound setup.

features.thesis: 5 sessions: non-AI earnings evidence offers diversification during rotation away from crowded technology winners. 20 sessions: a 46-month-high June and 15-quarter-high second quarter, backed by order visibility to year-end or January, create a less-crowded fundamental rerating path.
features.risk: Consumer slowdown, customer concentration, FX moves and elevated producer costs can compress apparel margins; visible orders can still be delayed or cancelled if global demand weakens.

features.thesis: 5 sessions: the stock's 1.27% gain during a 6.47% index drop confirms defensive relative strength without relying on a technology rebound. 20 sessions: record-scale June and first-half revenue plus the completed rebranding of 62 hypermarkets and 221 supermarkets provide an operating catalyst.
features.risk: Food-input inflation and integration or rebranding costs can squeeze margins; the defensive bid may reverse quickly, and modest revenue growth limits upside if risk appetite returns to higher-beta names.

features.thesis: 5 sessions: a 2.15% rise during the market crash and strong liquidity fit a defensive continuation, but the fresh safety-trade extension keeps it fifth. 20 sessions: first-half net income of NT$21.307 billion and EPS of NT$1.44 provide fundamental support if volatility persists.
features.risk: A reversal of the crowded safety trade can erase short-term relative strength; deeper market losses can create securities mark-to-market pressure, while NIM compression or weaker credit quality would invalidate the earnings support.

risk_observation.disclosure: 2026-07-17 was not predicted by this prospective layer; collection starts on 2026-07-20.

research_state.summary: 目前沒有規則同時通過「近五年平均為正、賺錢率夠高、且贏0050率過半」；所以選股端只能當方向觀察，不應當成正式買進模型。
research_state.formal_status: 研究資料初檢通過；模型未驗證
